zh.Rixton-with-Glazebrook, Warrington, Lanc: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Rixton於從1337年到1357年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Matthew de Rixton42歲，母親Isabell de Rixton37歲。他於1359年與Lady Isabel de Warrington在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1399年10月在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Rixton于从1337年到1357年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Matthew de Rixton42岁，母亲Isabell de Rixton37岁。他于1359年与Lady Isabel de Warrington在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1399年10月在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rixton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly from an unrecorded Old English personal name,Pīcstān, from pīc ‘point, pike’ +stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Rixton was born from 1337 to 1357, in Lancashire, England, his father, Matthew de Rixton, was 42 and his mother, Isabell de Rixton, was 37. He married Lady Isabel de Warrington in 1359, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died about October 1399, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Rixton est né du 1337 au 1357, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew de Rixton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabell de Rixton, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel de Warrington en 1359, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé environ octobre 1399, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Rixton von 1337 bis 1357 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew de Rixton 42 und seine Mutter Isabell de Rixton 37. Er hat 1359 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Isabel de Warrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um Oktober 1399 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Rixton è nato il da 1337 a 1357 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Matthew de Rixton, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Isabell de Rixton, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel de Warrington nel 1359, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa ottobre 1399, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Rixtonがから1337年まで1357年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Matthew de Rixtonは42歳，母Isabell de Rixtonは37歳であった。1359年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでLady Isabel de Warringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1399年10月に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Rixton(이)가 1337년 부터 1357년 까지 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew de Rixton(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell de Rixton(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Lady Isabel de Warrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1399년 10월 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Rixton nasceu de 1337 a 1357, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew de Rixton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabell de Rixton, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel de Warrington em 1359, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente outubro de 1399, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Rixton родился с 1337 по 1357 в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Matthew de Rixton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabell de Rixton, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel de Warrington в 1359 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер около октябрь 1399 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Rixton nació desde 1337 hasta 1357, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew de Rixton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabell de Rixton, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel de Warrington en 1359, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente octubre de 1399, en su pueblo.
